title: Walter Pack
description: The modpack I made for my server!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/z1f4IzkQ/images/d745cd0c2d96b2e56659e7457526ede8c823452a.png)

# Welcome!
This is a modpack I made and am currently using for my server. There are currently 2 major versions each with different mods, so make sure to check out what each has to offer.

# Versions
## Walter Pack 2
An even more lightweight modpack without any added fluff. No content, biomes, or new items. Just pure QoL and preformance.

## Walter Pack 1
The original version of the mod pack. This version adds multiple mods for generation, quality of life, preformance, building, etc. If you're looking for a lightweight modpack with loads of new biomes, and a big variety of blocks this is definitely for you.

Something that should be kept in mind is that if you try connecting to localhost, you will be redirected to another ip. This is thanks to Modflared. You can change this by going to Modflared's config file.

### What mods are included? (1.2.2.2)
There are way too many mods, but you can find a full rundown of them and credits [over here!](https://modrinth.com/modpack/walter/version/1.2.2.2) While I don't have any plans of maitaining this version, you are free to try it out!
